benefits.description: Lost 64 pounds over the year, from 200 lbs to 136 lbs. Added Cagri (Retatrutide) when weight loss slowed and hunger increased, allowing further calorie reduction.
Initially on Tirzepatide 15mg, became hungrier in August, added Retatrutide to suppress appetite further and enable lower calorie intake

side_effects.description: Period stopped coming after 60 days, then only spotting, now stopped completely. Concerns about low calorie intake (1250-1350 cal/day) triggering amenorrhea.

protocol_notes: Female, 5'7" tall. Lost weight from 200 lbs to 136 lbs over approximately 1 year. Currently on Tirzepatide 15mg and Retatrutide (dose unspecified). Consuming 1250-1350 calories per day. Goal weight was 132 lbs (60 kg). Currently in 4-week weight loss plateau. High muscle mass reported by scale.
